sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: These Terms of Service are intended to define the rights, obligations, responsibilities, conditions of use, and dispute resolution standards between the operator and users in relation to the use of Hinobody (the "Service").

sections.title: Definitions
sections.body:
"User" means any member or non-member who agrees to these Terms and uses the Service.

"Member" means a user who has created an account.

"Content" means all materials uploaded, written, or transmitted by users through the Service, including posts, comments, images, links, messages (chat), and profile information.

"Operator" means the entity that operates and manages the Service.

sections.title: Agreement to Terms and Changes
sections.body:
By using the Service, users are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.

The Operator may amend these Terms as necessary due to laws, service policies, or security needs, and will notify users through in-service notices or other reasonable methods. Reddit also operates under a policy update and notice structure.

sections.title: Accounts and Registration
sections.body:
Members must provide accurate information and must not impersonate or use another person's information.

Account security, including password management, is the responsibility of the member, and the Operator shall not be liable for damages caused by unauthorized use by a third party unless caused by the Operator's intentional misconduct or gross negligence.

The Operator may restrict, reject, or terminate registration in the following cases:

• False information
• Identity theft
• Repeated policy violations
• Illegal purposes
• System abuse, etc.

sections.title: Nature of the Service and Medical/Beauty Disclaimer (Important)
sections.body:
This Service is a platform for sharing experiences and community discussion related to beauty, procedures, skincare, and aesthetic treatments.

Content on the Service does not replace medical or professional advice, diagnosis, treatment, or prescription, and the Operator does not provide medical services.

Users must consult a licensed medical professional directly before making decisions related to medical or aesthetic procedures, and any results arising from use of the Service, including side effects, costs, or disputes, are the sole responsibility of the user.

The Operator does not guarantee the accuracy, timeliness, effectiveness, or safety of information on the Service.

sections.title: User Content Rights and License
sections.body:
Copyright in Content shall, in principle, belong to the user who posts it.

Users grant the Operator a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free, sublicensable license to use, display, distribute, and otherwise make available such Content to the extent necessary to operate, improve, present, and distribute the Service. This follows a general UGC platform structure.

Users represent and warrant that they do not infringe the copyrights, portrait rights, or personal information rights of any third party.

sections.title: Responsibility for Photo/Image Uploads (Important)
sections.body:
Users represent and warrant the following regarding uploaded photos:

• They took the photo themselves or otherwise have the right to upload it
• The upload does not infringe portrait rights, privacy, copyright, or other rights
• It does not unlawfully include another person's sensitive information, such as full facial images, resident registration numbers, medical records, or addresses

Users bear full responsibility for the act and consequences of uploading photos, and the Operator (and site administrators) shall not be liable absent intentional misconduct or gross negligence.

sections.title: Uploaded File Storage Policy (Important)
sections.body:
The Service may process image files in order to provide features, such as eye masking.

Uploaded files that are not published as posts are, in principle, not stored permanently and are processed only within the period and scope necessary to perform the relevant feature.

Images published as part of a post, including masking results, may be stored and transmitted for as long as the post remains available in order to provide the Service.

Users should avoid uploading photos containing sensitive personal information.

sections.title: Prohibited Conduct
sections.body:
Users must not engage in the following:

• Encouraging illegal acts or crimes, illegal transactions, or brokering
• Infringing the rights of others, including copyright, trademark, portrait rights, or personal information rights
• Hate, violence, harassment, threats, or discrimination
• Pornographic content, child sexual exploitation material, or excessively graphic/explicit content in violation of policy
• Spam, flooding, automation/bots, or causing service disruption
• Account transfer/sale or bypassing authentication
• Acts that may violate laws related to medical advertising, medical inducement, or brokering (see Section 10 below)

Reddit also treats illegal activity, harassment, and service disruption as core prohibited conduct.

sections.title: Restrictions on Medical/Beauty Advertising and Marketing (Important)
sections.body:
Users must not post content that violates applicable laws or guidelines, including unlawful medical advertising, inducement or brokering of medical institutions or medical professionals, manipulated reviews, or undisclosed paid reviews.

In particular, Korean medical law may impose restrictions on the subjects and methods of medical advertising, and the Service may remove or block posts in order to comply.

The Operator does not make any final determination or guarantee as to whether user content constitutes medical advertising, and legal responsibility may belong to the poster.

sections.title: Operator Actions (Content Management)
sections.body:
The Operator may take the following actions:

• Delete, blind, or restrict access to content
• Warn, temporarily suspend, or permanently suspend accounts
• Restrict specific functions such as posting, commenting, or messaging

The Operator may take such actions within a reasonable scope to ensure service safety and legal compliance.

sections.title: Messaging (Chat) Function
sections.body:
Users must not use messaging functions for spam, harassment, or illegal promotion.

Disputes between users shall, in principle, be resolved by the parties themselves, and the Operator shall not intervene unless required by law, though reporting or blocking tools may be provided where necessary.

sections.title: Disclaimer and Limitation of Liability (Important)
sections.body:
The Operator shall not be liable, to the extent permitted by law, for the following:

• Accuracy or reliability of user-generated content
• Decisions made based on medical/beauty information
• Disputes, fraud, or rights violations between users
• Failures of third-party services, including payment providers, social login providers, cloud services, and CDNs

Even if damages are recognized against the Operator, liability may be limited to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: Reporting and Rights Infringement Response
sections.body: Users may report illegal or rights-infringing content through the designated reporting/contact channel, and the Operator may take action in accordance with applicable law and policy.

sections.title: Service Suspension
sections.body: The Operator may temporarily suspend the Service due to maintenance, failures, third-party service issues, or operational necessity.

sections.title: Governing Law and Disputes
sections.body:
These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, and disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent court.

(This clause should be adjusted depending on the actual operating entity and jurisdiction.)

sections.title: Categories of Personal Information Collected
sections.body:
Required:
• Email address
• Username (nickname)
• Password hash (the original password is not stored)
• Login records

Optional:
• Profile information entered by the user, such as introduction or links

Automatically collected:
• Access logs
• IP address
• Device/browser information
• Cookies/identifiers
• Usage records

sections.title: Purposes of Use
sections.body:
• Registration and identity verification
• Login processing
• Providing services such as posts, comments, and messages
• Security and fraud/abuse prevention
• Customer support
• Service improvement/statistics, to the extent possible through de-identification or aggregation

sections.title: Retention and Use Period
sections.body:
Personal information is, in principle, destroyed without delay when a user withdraws membership.

However, where retention is required by applicable law, such information may be kept for the relevant statutory period and then destroyed.

(Guidelines generally emphasize principles and procedures for destruction.)

sections.title: Destruction Procedures and Methods
sections.body:
Electronic files: deleted using irreversible methods

Printed materials: shredded or incinerated

sections.title: Third-Party Provision and Outsourcing
sections.body:
Personal information is not provided to third parties without consent in principle.

However, outsourcing to external providers may occur for service operation, including for example:

• Cloud/hosting (servers)
• Image storage (such as S3)
• Email delivery (such as Resend)
• Social login (Google/Apple)
• Analytics tools (optional)

Any outsourcing will be subject to contracts, management, and supervision in accordance with applicable law.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.body: Users may request access to, correction of, deletion of, or suspension of processing of their personal information. Requests may be submitted to hinobodysupport@gmail.com.

sections.title: Children/Youth (Age) Policy
sections.body:
The Service may, in principle, restrict or require additional parental/legal guardian consent for users below the age that requires such consent by law (for example, under age 14).

The Operator may introduce age verification or restriction features.

(Recent platforms face increasing regulation and enforcement related to protection of children's data.)

sections.title: Security
sections.body: The Operator implements reasonable technical and administrative safeguards. However, due to the nature of the Internet, 100% security cannot be guaranteed.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: Use of Cookies
sections.body:
Hinobody may use cookies and similar technologies in order to maintain login sessions, provide security, store language settings, and support core service functions.

Required cookies:
• Login sessions
• Security tokens
• Language settings

Optional cookies (if introduced):
• Traffic analytics
• Performance improvement

Users may refuse cookie storage through browser settings, but some functions may be limited as a result.

sections.title: Safety and Respect
sections.body:
• No harassment, hate, discrimination, or incitement of violence
• No insulting others based on appearance, illness, disability, nationality, gender, etc.

sections.title: Protection of Personal and Sensitive Information
sections.body:
• No disclosure of others' real names, contact information, addresses, medical information, etc.
• Even users posting their own content should be cautious when uploading sensitive medical images such as full-face images or medical records

sections.title: Guidelines for Posting Medical/Procedure Information
sections.body:
• Personal experience-based writing is encouraged
• Statements that definitively prescribe treatment, medication, diagnosis, or similar content that may be mistaken for medical practice are prohibited
• Exaggerated or false information is prohibited

sections.title: Advertising/Promotion/Paid Reviews
sections.body:
• Reviews or promotions created in exchange for compensation must clearly disclose advertisement/sponsorship
• Illegal medical advertising, inducement/brokering, and manipulated reviews are prohibited
• Spam links and repetitive posting are prohibited

sections.title: Image / Before-and-After Photo Guidelines
sections.body:
• Before-and-after photos may easily identify individuals and should be handled carefully
• Uploading a third party's photo without explicit consent is prohibited
• Use of mosaic/masking tools is recommended

sections.title: Reporting / Sanctions
sections.body:
Users may report content that violates policy.

The Operator may issue warnings, remove content, limit functions, or suspend accounts.

sections.title: Filing a Report
sections.body:
A rights holder (or agent) may request action by email, including the following:

• URL/location of the allegedly infringing content
• Evidence of rights ownership (copyright, trademark, portrait rights, etc.)
• Contact information
• A statement of good-faith reporting and responsibility for false claims

Email: hinobodysupport@gmail.com (or support email)

sections.title: Actions
sections.body:
After review, the Operator may:

• Temporarily block or remove content
• Request additional materials
• Provide notice and restoration/counter-notice procedures

sections.title: Repeat Infringers
sections.body: Accounts repeatedly found to infringe rights may be restricted or terminated.

sections.title: Commitment
sections.body:
Hinobody aims to provide an accessible service for a wide range of users.

• Support for mobile and desktop environments
• Gradual improvement of keyboard accessibility, color contrast, and similar accessibility features

To report accessibility issues: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: Policy
sections.body:
Hinobody may restrict advertising and marketing activities in order to protect users and comply with applicable law.

• Promotion related to medical institutions or procedures must comply with applicable laws, and content that may violate them may be removed or sanctioned.
• Paid content must be clearly disclosed.
• Spam, automated promotion, and flooding are prohibited.
• The Operator may restrict advertising accounts or content without prior notice.

sections.title: Moderator Powers
sections.body:
The Operator may exercise the following powers:

• Review reported posts
• Delete or hide posts
• Delete comments
• Warn users
• Temporarily suspend accounts
• Permanently suspend accounts
• Restrict specific functions such as posting, commenting, or messaging

These actions are taken within a reasonable scope for policy enforcement and legal compliance.

sections.title: Enforcement Levels
sections.body:
Depending on the seriousness of the violation, the Operator may take the following actions:

• Level 1 — Warning
• Level 2 — Post deletion
• Level 3 — Temporary account restriction
• Level 4 — Permanent account suspension

Serious violations, such as illegal content, child sexual exploitation material, fraud, or exposure of personal information, may result in immediate permanent suspension.

sections.title: Reporting System
sections.body:
Users may report the following content:

• Illegal content
• False medical information
• Advertising in violation of medical law
• Harassment / hate speech
• Copyright infringement
• Exposure of personal information

Reporting email: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: Community Operating Principles
sections.body:
Hinobody is operated based on the following principles:

• Maintaining a safe community environment
• Protecting users
• Sharing lawful information
• Transparent content management

sections.title: Copyright Infringement Reports
sections.body:
A copyright owner or agent may report infringement by including the following:

• URL or location of the infringing content
• Evidence of copyright ownership
• Contact information of the reporter
• Good-faith statement

Reporting email: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: Procedure
sections.body:
After reviewing the report, the Operator may take the following actions:

• Temporarily block content
• Delete content
• Notify the poster
• Request additional materials

sections.title: Counter Notice
sections.body: A poster may submit a counter notice if they believe their content is lawful.

sections.title: Repeat Infringer Policy
sections.body:
Accounts repeatedly found to infringe copyright may be subject to:

• Restriction of posting functions
• Account suspension
• Permanent account deletion

sections.title: Prohibition of Harassment and Hate Speech
sections.body:
The following conduct is prohibited:

• Sexual harassment
• Harassment
• Threats
• Hate speech
• Discrimination against specific groups

sections.title: Prohibition of Illegal Medical Advertising and Procedure Inducement
sections.body:
The following conduct is prohibited:

• Illegal medical advertising
• Brokering of medical institutions
• Undisclosed compensated reviews
• False claims about treatment effects
• Inducing unlawful procedures

Posts that may violate Korean medical law or other applicable laws may be removed.

sections.title: Protection of Minors
sections.body:
Hinobody strictly prohibits the following content:

• Child sexual exploitation content
• Inappropriate content targeting minors
• Disclosure of minors' personal information

If such content is discovered, it may be removed immediately and the account may be suspended.

sections.title: Report Handling Standards (SLA)
sections.body:
The Operator aims to handle reports according to the following standards where reasonably possible:

• Urgent dangerous content → Action as quickly as possible
• General policy violations → Review within a reasonable time

Inquiry/report email: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: User Blocking Functions
sections.body:
Users may protect themselves from unwanted users through the following:

• Message blocking
• User blocking

sections.title: Disclosure
sections.body:
Hinobody seeks to maintain transparency to strengthen trust in the community.

Upon request or where necessary, the Operator may disclose:

• Number of removed contents
• Number of suspended accounts
• Statistics by policy violation type

This is intended to maintain fairness in community safety and policy enforcement.

Inquiry email: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: Vulnerability Reporting
sections.body: If a security vulnerability is discovered, it may be reported to: hinobodysupport@gmail.com

sections.title: Responsible Disclosure
sections.body:
Users who discover vulnerabilities must follow these principles:

• Do not exploit the vulnerability
• Do not access user data
• Report the vulnerability to the Operator before public disclosure

sections.title: Security Response
sections.body: The Operator will review vulnerability reports and take corrective action within a reasonable period.
